name: public-site-technographics
description: Inspect public website HTML, headers, scripts, and meta tags to produce lightweight technology signals.
business_value: No-key technographic qualification for account scoring and outbound segmentation.
verification_result: Live smoke checked a public website response and verified HTML/header inspection can run without an API key.
known_risks: Only public client-side signals are visible.
Commercial technographic data may still be better for exhaustive coverage.
